subcodes.first_line: The hosts of divine love and affection turned their gaze upon existence, and finding every heart receptive, conquered and took possession thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جنود عشق و محبت الهی بر وجود توجه نمود هر قلب را مقبل یافت مسخر نمود اخذش
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @love of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation
